title: sterculia decipiens
intro: Sterculia decipiens, also known as the Indian lythrum, is a plant species belonging to the family Malvaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine, where its roots and leaves are valued for their medicinal properties. The roots and leaves of Sterculia decipiens are said to possess anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and skin infections. In herbal preparations, the roots and leaves can be made into a decoction, powder, or capsule, and are also used in traditional remedies such as teas and ointments.
